target.title: docs: add maturity test skeleton
target.body:
## Summary

- add a short `docs/reference/maturity-tests.md` page for maturity scorecard coverage
- describe the current source files, scenario coverage IDs, and `qa coverage` workflow
- link the page from QA/testing docs, docs navigation, labeler metadata, and the zh-CN glossary
- keep the page current-behavior only: no named follow-up owner, release-blocking policy, or planned filter docs

## Verification

- `pnpm docs:list`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm check:docs`
- `pnpm openclaw qa coverage --match ui.control`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: OpenClaw now has a simple public docs page for reading and adding maturity scorecard QA coverage without publishing planned release-policy language.

Real environment tested: local OpenClaw docs checkout.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm docs:list`; `git diff --check`; `pnpm check:docs`; `pnpm openclaw qa coverage --match ui.control`.

Evidence after fix: docs formatting, markdown lint, MDX check, i18n glossary check, and internal link audit passed through `pnpm check:docs`; the link audit reported `broken_links=0`; `qa coverage --match ui.control` printed matching `qa suite --scenario ...` commands for the scorecard coverage ID.

Observed result after fix: the new page is included in `pnpm docs:list`, docs checks pass, and the documented coverage command resolves real scenario matches.

What was not tested: no QA scenario execution; this is docs and metadata only.
target.author: romneyda
